title: Avutometinib Combo Shows Activity, Safety for HR+/HER2- Breast Cancer
summary: Preliminary results from a phase 1 trial show an objective response rate of 13.3% with avutometinib, abemaciclib, and fulvestrant in CDK4/6 inhibitor–resistant HR+/HER2– metastatic breast cancer.

title: Brain health experts' top 3 tips for lowering your risk of dementia, stroke and depression—all at the same time
summary: There are ways that you can lower your risk of dementia, stroke and depression simultaneously. Here are the top three practices, from brain health experts.

title: Skin-to-skin contact improves breastfeeding but not cognitive outcomes in very preterm infants: Clinical trial
summary: Researchers led by the Trondheim University Hospital in Norway report that two hours of immediate skin-to-skin contact between mothers and very preterm infants after birth does not improve cognitive, motor, or language development by age 2 to 3 years. Infants receiving the intervention did show significantly improved breastfeeding outcomes.

title: Encephalitis Prevention is Just A Vaccination Away
summary: Encephalitis patients confirmed in Australia and India in 2025

title: Teen skin bacteria could hold the secret to acne prevention
summary: Scientists from MIT have discovered that the teenage years are the key window when acne-linked bacteria take hold on our faces.

title: Spring COVID-19 vaccination available
summary: Those 80 years and older and others at risk are eligible for additional dose.

title: Unhealthy lifestyle may be accelerating ageing of the heart: Study
summary: For patients with diabetes, hypertension, obesity, and atrial fibrillation, the functional heart age was significantly higher

title: The effects of type 2 diabetes on postoperative pneumonia in patients
summary: this study investigates the association between T2DM and POP after VATS, and further explores the risk factors involved in POP in patients without T2DM.

title: Single Dose of Xofluza Reduces Odds of Untreated Household Members Contracting Influenza
summary: Reductions of about 32% were observed during the study.
